description_long: This is a rectangular, vertically-oriented banner with a yellowish-tan background and bold black text reading 'DON'T TREAD ON ME' above and below a stylized coiled rattlesnake graphic. The banner appears to be made of a flexible, fabric-like material, possibly canvas or vinyl, with a slightly rough, matte surface. The text and snake design are printed in a high-contrast, stencil-like style, making the message highly visible from a distance. The edges of the banner are straight and clean, with no visible mounting hardware or frame, suggesting it may be attached directly to a flat surface. The reverse side of the banner shows the design mirrored, indicating the material is thin enough for the print to be visible from both sides. This type of banner is commonly used for public messaging or protest in urban environments.
description: A vertical yellow banner with bold black 'DON'T TREAD ON ME' text and a coiled rattlesnake graphic, printed on a matte, fabric-like surface.
description_view_0: A thin edge-on view of the banner, showing its minimal thickness and straight vertical profile.
description_view_1: The reverse side of the banner, displaying the mirrored 'DON'T TREAD ON ME' text and snake graphic, indicating the print is visible through the material.
description_view_2: Another thin edge-on view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the banner's slimness and lack of visible support structure.
description_view_3: The front of the banner, clearly showing the 'DON'T TREAD ON ME' text and coiled rattlesnake graphic in black on a yellow background.
